text: Deno (Ryan Dahl, 2018, Node.js creator) is a secure JavaScript/TypeScript runtime built on Rust (Tokio) and V8. Native TypeScript support, security-first (no file/network access by default), built-in tooling (formatter, linter, test runner, bundler). Deno 2 (2024) added backward compatibility with Node.js/npm ecosystem.
Deno 2: `deno add npm:express` — use npm packages natively.
